title: selliguea bellisquamata
intro: Selliguea bellisquamata, also known as the lesser polymnia, is a species of plant in the Polypodiaceae family, commonly found in tropical Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and inflammation. It is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving respiratory function, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Selliguea bellisquamata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
